case_title: YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. VS. LUIS FERRERIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERRERIA, LUIS DOES I TO X THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET, UNIT 735, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72539022)
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 72539022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC.
DECLARATION OF AARON FARMER ESQ RE FAIR RENTAL VALUE AND UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 72539022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72539022), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. SERVED FEB-27-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES I TO X

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FERRERIA, LUIS DOES I TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72539022), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES, INC. SERVED FEB-27-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT FERRERIA, LUIS
